free_text: Resonance neutron capture by 20,22Ne in stellar
calibrated by saturated resonance method using 4.9eV
Samples of high-purity neon and enriched 22Ne gas in a
cylinder with 0.12 mm walls. The mass of stainless
steel in the beam is 4.12 g.
BP:Updated to new data formats,lower case.

Resonances are possibly either statistical artifacts
or peaks created by small errors in correcting for
Maxwellian averaged cross section calculated with
Maxwellian averaged cross section calculated with
code MAXWL. The six peaks below 200 keV are treated
as resonances in 22Ne(n,g) and all other known
resonances below 2000 keV are included in the
Maxwellian averaged cross section calculated with
code MAXWL. The six peaks below 200 keV are omitted.
